fdi-filing-rbi.label: What type of FDI transaction is involved (investment/transfer)?
Provide details of the foreign investor (name and country)?
Which sector does your business fall under?
Do you have FIRC and bank documents (Yes/No)?
When was the investment received (approximate date)?

fla-return-filing.label: Do you have FDI/ODI transactions to report (Yes/No + brief)?
For which financial year is FLA return required?
Have you filed FLA return earlier (Yes/No)?
Is there any delay in filing (Yes/No)?

fssai-renewal.label: What is your FSSAI license/registration number?
What is the expiry date of your FSSAI license?
Has your food business activity changed (Yes/No)?
Do you have required documents ready (Yes/No)?
Do you need any modifications during renewal (Yes/No)?

fssai-return-filing.label: What is your FSSAI license number?
For which financial year/period is return to be filed?
What is your food business activity (manufacturer/trader)?
Do you have sales and production data ready (Yes/No)?

hr-payroll-processing.label: How many employees need payroll processing?
Do you have a defined salary structure (Yes/No)?
Do you need PF, ESI, PT compliance included (Yes/No)?
Do you have attendance/leave tracking system (Yes/No)?
Do you prefer any payroll software or need recommendation?

pf-return-filing.label: What is your PF registration number?
How many employees are covered under PF?
Do you have monthly salary and PF data ready (Yes/No)?
For which period are returns to be filed?
Have previous PF returns been filed (Yes/No)?
Is there any delay or penalty applicable (Yes/No/Not sure)?

esi-return-filing.label: What is your ESI registration number?
How many employees are covered under ESI?
Do you have employee salary data ready (Yes/No)?
For which period is return filing required?
Have previous ESI returns been filed (Yes/No)?
Is there any delay in filing (Yes/No/Not sure)?

professional-tax-return-filing.label: What is your Professional Tax registration number?
In which state are you filing PT returns?
Do you have salary data ready (Yes/No)?
For which period is return filing required?
Have previous PT returns been filed (Yes/No)?

partnership-compliance.label: For which financial year is compliance required?
Were there any changes in partners (Yes/No)?

proprietorship-compliance.label: What is the PAN of the proprietor?
What is the nature of business?
Do you maintain books of accounts (Yes/No)?
Are GST and ITR filings up to date (Yes/No)?

bookkeeping-services.label: Approximate number of transactions per month?
Which accounting software are you currently using (if any)?
Do you have backlog bookkeeping pending (Yes/No + period)?
Do you need GST reconciliation support (Yes/No)?
What reports do you need (P&L, balance sheet, etc.)?

ca-support-services.label: What type of CA support do you need (advisory, compliance, etc.)?
Describe the issue or requirement briefly?
Do you have relevant documents ready (Yes/No)?
Do you need one-time or ongoing support?

business-plan-services.label: Who is your target market or customers?
How much funding do you require (approximate)?
Why do you need the business plan (investors/loan/internal)?
Do you have any financial projections (Yes/No)?
By when do you need the business plan?
